formula: WAR = total_jokes × max(shrunk_quality − replacement_quality, 0); shrunk_quality = (n·observed + k·league_median) / (n + k)
notes: Replacement quality is the 25th percentile of the (craft+impact)/2 quality metric among "bench-player" characters with 10–50 analyzed jokes. Bayesian shrinkage (k=30) regresses small-sample estimates toward the league median.
